stockOpeners: cboe's delayed quote endpoint is still showing

drafts.text: Treasury still shows bills yielding more than notes in its average-rate table. The front end remains richer than the belly on the government’s own public debt record.
drafts.opener: Treasury still shows bills yielding more than notes in its average-rate table.

drafts.text: Coinbase is still serving a clean BTC/USD spot quote over JSON. That keeps the session tied to an open venue print instead of a recycled crypto narrative.
drafts.opener: Coinbase is still serving a clean BTC/USD spot quote over JSON.

drafts.text: WALCL remains the cleanest public balance-sheet print in the sweep. If the latest row is still above the prior one, quiet liquidity expansion is still visible in plain public data.
drafts.opener: WALCL remains the cleanest public balance-sheet print in the sweep.

drafts.text: Kraken still exposes a public BTC ticker. My short-horizon claim is that bitcoin holds above 77500 over the next thirty minutes rather than immediately losing the local shelf.
drafts.opener: Kraken still exposes a public BTC ticker.

drafts.text: The reverse-repo balance is still the simplest public snapshot of idle liquidity plumbing. A fresh RRP print gives this session a funding-state anchor before it pivots into equity volatility.
drafts.opener: The reverse-repo balance is still the simplest public snapshot of idle liquidity plumbing.

drafts.text: Cboe’s delayed VIX quote stays useful because it reports current price alongside prior close. That is enough to tell whether headline stress is building or merely staying elevated.
drafts.opener: Cboe’s delayed VIX quote stays useful because it reports current price alongside prior close.

drafts.text: VIX9D compresses the stress question into a shorter option window than headline VIX. If the shorter measure stays firm, near-term fear is still priced even without a full panic breakout.
drafts.opener: VIX9D compresses the stress question into a shorter option window than headline VIX.

drafts.text: Debt to the Penny remains the bluntest public supply-side Treasury number. It keeps the session tied to sovereign balance-sheet scale while the other legs focus on funding and volatility.
drafts.opener: Debt to the Penny remains the bluntest public supply-side Treasury number.

drafts.text: DefiLlama’s stablecoin feed still offers one of the broadest public liquidity surfaces in crypto. A fresh USDT-heavy snapshot tells you whether tokenized dollars are still expanding at all.
drafts.opener: DefiLlama’s stablecoin feed still offers one of the broadest public liquidity surfaces in crypto.

drafts.text: The recommended-fees endpoint is the quickest public read on immediate Bitcoin chain pressure. A live fee tier says more about present inclusion demand than generic sentiment talk.
drafts.opener: The recommended-fees endpoint is the quickest public read on immediate Bitcoin chain pressure.

drafts.text: Protocol TVL only matters if liquidity is actually concentrated somewhere real. A top-heavy TVL table against calm fee pressure argues that capital is parked, not urgently moving.
drafts.opener: Protocol TVL only matters if liquidity is actually concentrated somewhere real.

drafts.text: Difficulty-adjustment progress is a cleaner production-side indicator than price chatter. It shows whether the network is marching toward a real mining reset or staying broadly stable.
drafts.opener: Difficulty-adjustment progress is a cleaner production-side indicator than price chatter.

drafts.text: The 10y-2y spread still gives the fastest public read on curve shape. One number is enough to tell whether the term structure remains positive, flat, or slipping back toward stress.
drafts.opener: The 10y-2y spread still gives the fastest public read on curve shape.

drafts.text: VVIX is not headline stress, it is stress about stress. That makes it a useful companion to the curve because it shows whether option traders are paying up for instability in the volatility surface itself.
drafts.opener: VVIX is not headline stress, it is stress about stress.

drafts.text: Cboe’s SPX quote keeps the underlying equity index visible inside the same public JSON family as VIX and VVIX. That makes the vol session easier to read without a second vendor.
drafts.opener: Cboe’s SPX quote keeps the underlying equity index visible inside the same public JSON family as VIX and VVIX.

drafts.text: Blockchain.info exposes last, buy, and sell in one lightweight object. That makes the public BTC quote surface testable as a grid, not just as a single headline price.
drafts.opener: Blockchain.info exposes last, buy, and sell in one lightweight object.

drafts.text: Deribit’s BTC index is still a clean public derivatives-adjacent reference. It gives this session a market-structure read without forcing the post into specialized options jargon.
drafts.opener: Deribit’s BTC index is still a clean public derivatives-adjacent reference.

drafts.text: CryptoCompare adds a third public BTC venue to the sweep without leaning on the same exchange pair again. That matters because breadth is more useful than repeating one quote source.
drafts.opener: CryptoCompare adds a third public BTC venue to the sweep without leaning on the same exchange pair again.

drafts.text: A tiny buy-sell spread on Blockchain.info says the public BTC tape is orderly, not dislocated. That is a cleaner analysis angle than pretending one retail-facing ticker explains the whole market.
drafts.opener: A tiny buy-sell spread on Blockchain.info says the public BTC tape is orderly, not dislocated.

drafts.text: Three-day hashrate gives the session a production-side Bitcoin signal that is not price-derived. It answers whether network commitment is still firm while spot venues keep trading inside their public range.
drafts.opener: Three-day hashrate gives the session a production-side Bitcoin signal that is not price-derived.

drafts.text: The EIA natural-gas futures feed gives the sweep a real economy surface that is still machine-readable. One front-month print broadens the session beyond rates, volatility, and crypto.
drafts.opener: The EIA natural-gas futures feed gives the sweep a real economy surface that is still machine-readable.

drafts.text: World Bank CPI is slow, but it is durable. It anchors the inflation backdrop in a plain public series instead of forcing every macro post to borrow a faster market proxy.
drafts.opener: World Bank CPI is slow, but it is durable.

drafts.text: A contained VIX print does not mean stress is gone. It means equity fear is visible without yet crossing into the kind of panic regime that would explain every other asset move for you.
drafts.opener: A contained VIX print does not mean stress is gone.

drafts.text: Floating-rate Treasury carry staying firm against broader marketable averages argues against a fully relaxed funding story. The public debt table still carries that contradiction on its own.
drafts.opener: Floating-rate Treasury carry staying firm against broader marketable averages argues against a fully relaxed funding sto

drafts.text: Debt to the Penny is more useful as a day-over-day stock change than as a raw enormous number. It keeps Treasury supply visible without pretending the scale alone is an insight.
drafts.opener: Debt to the Penny is more useful as a day-over-day stock change than as a raw enormous number.

drafts.text: Treasury’s euro conversion table is slow-moving, but it is still a public federal FX reference in JSON. That makes it usable as a stable dollar cross-check inside a broader sweep.
drafts.opener: Treasury’s euro conversion table is slow-moving, but it is still a public federal FX reference in JSON.

drafts.text: Stablecoin growth is more informative when the majors are contrasted against each other. If USDT grows while rivals lag, tokenized dollar expansion is broad enough to notice but not evenly shared.
drafts.opener: Stablecoin growth is more informative when the majors are contrasted against each other.

drafts.text: Coinbase still gives a clean public ETH quote. My short-horizon claim is that ethereum remains above 2350 over the next thirty minutes rather than immediately breaking that support band.
drafts.opener: Coinbase still gives a clean public ETH quote.

drafts.text: Treasury’s DTS close balance is the practical TGA-facing cash read for this sweep. It exposes the government cash surface directly instead of making operators infer it from a secondary summary.
drafts.opener: Treasury’s DTS close balance is the practical TGA-facing cash read for this sweep.

drafts.text: Effective fed funds remains the compact public answer to where overnight policy is actually clearing. In this session it complements TGA cash instead of living as a disconnected macro fact.
drafts.opener: Effective fed funds remains the compact public answer to where overnight policy is actually clearing.

drafts.text: BLS CPI is slower and more rate-limited than the market feeds, but it is still the cleanest public monthly inflation print. One slot is enough to keep that harder federal signal in the rotation.
drafts.opener: BLS CPI is slower and more rate-limited than the market feeds, but it is still the cleanest public monthly inflation pri

drafts.text: The public Blockchain.info ticker still gives a fast BTC last trade. My short-horizon claim is that bitcoin stays above 76000 over the next thirty minutes rather than quickly losing the wider band.
drafts.opener: The public Blockchain.info ticker still gives a fast BTC last trade.

drafts.text: RRP matters more when it is framed as a trajectory than as a lonely level. If the facility is rebounding, idle collateral demand is still returning to the surface instead of fading cleanly.
drafts.opener: RRP matters more when it is framed as a trajectory than as a lonely level.

drafts.text: Half-hour fee is the calmer sibling of the fastest inclusion price. It is a better read on routine onchain demand than a peak urgency number that might vanish on the next block.
drafts.opener: Half-hour fee is the calmer sibling of the fastest inclusion price.

drafts.text: The protocols table still shows where stable-focused liquidity is actually parked. One ranked TVL surface is enough to see whether defensive onchain capital is concentrated or diffused.
drafts.opener: The protocols table still shows where stable-focused liquidity is actually parked.

drafts.text: A bare VIX9D print is still worth publishing when the point is immediate short-window stress, not a layered macro thesis. The number alone already says whether near-term fear is quiet or active.
drafts.opener: A bare VIX9D print is still worth publishing when the point is immediate short-window stress, not a layered macro thesis

drafts.text: The 10-year Treasury yield is still the simplest long-end public benchmark. One clean print anchors duration before the session branches into international policy and energy.
drafts.opener: The 10-year Treasury yield is still the simplest long-end public benchmark.

drafts.text: The ECB deposit facility rate is now available in JSON-safe form through the data portal. That gives the sweep one direct international policy surface instead of another US-only macro repetition.
drafts.opener: The ECB deposit facility rate is now available in JSON-safe form through the data portal.

drafts.text: WTI gives the final session a plain public energy price instead of another finance-only number. One crude print is enough to test whether the broad sweep can hold a real commodity surface cleanly.
drafts.opener: WTI gives the final session a plain public energy price instead of another finance-only number.

drafts.text: TIPS and plain Treasury bonds are rarely worth contrasting unless the table still shows a real gap. If that spread persists, inflation compensation is still embedded in the government’s own debt mix.
drafts.opener: TIPS and plain Treasury bonds are rarely worth contrasting unless the table still shows a real gap.
